label: TLS/HTTPS
description: Securing web and API traffic with TLS
compliance_notes: CNSA 2.0 mandates ML-KEM hybrid by 2030 for U.S. government TLS. ANSSI / BSI both recommend hybrid by 2026-2028. Browsers + CDNs already deploying X25519MLKEM768.

label: Data-at-rest encryption
description: Encrypting stored data and files
compliance_notes: Symmetric ciphers (AES-256) remain quantum-safe. Critical migration target is the key-encapsulation mechanism (KEK / wrapping). HNDL risk is high for long-retention data.

label: Digital signatures / code signing
description: Signing software and documents cryptographically
compliance_notes: CNSA 2.0: code/firmware signing — 2025 preferred (ML-DSA / SLH-DSA), 2030 required, 2035 disallow non-PQC. Long device lifetimes mean signed binaries deployed today must verify with PQC keys post-2030.

label: Key exchange / agreement
description: Establishing shared secret keys between parties
compliance_notes: CNSA 2.0 + IETF hybrid drafts: ML-KEM + ECDH hybrid by 2026-2028, pure ML-KEM acceptable by 2030.

label: Authentication / identity
description: User and machine identity verification
compliance_notes: eIDAS 2.0 wallet: PQ-ready by 2026. FIDO2/WebAuthn ML-DSA proposals in IETF draft. FedRAMP requires PQC by 2030.

label: Blockchain / cryptocurrency
description: Distributed ledger and digital asset cryptography
compliance_notes: No regulatory deadline — protocol-driven. Ethereum Foundation BIP-360 (ML-DSA + SLH-DSA) targets 2027-2029. Post-quantum migration here is rebase-style, not retrofit.

label: Email encryption (S/MIME, PGP)
description: Encrypting and signing email communications
compliance_notes: OpenPGP & S/MIME PQ algorithm IDs in IETF drafts; Thunderbird / Mozilla pilot deployments. Apple iMessage PQ3 already production. Most enterprise email lags; aim 2030 for full migration.

label: VPN / IPSec
description: Encrypted network tunnels and site-to-site VPNs
compliance_notes: CNSA 2.0 + DISA STIGs: IPSec/IKEv2 hybrid ML-KEM by 2026, required by 2028 for U.S. federal. Most enterprise VPN vendors shipping hybrid in 2025-2026.

label: IoT device communication
description: Cryptographic communication for connected devices
compliance_notes: IEC 62443 + ETSI TS 103 744 + GSMA NG.116. Constrained-device timelines lag general crypto by ~3 years. Device fleets with 10-15 yr lifecycle drive immediate planning.

label: Database encryption
description: Encrypting database contents and backups
compliance_notes: AES TDE remains quantum-safe; column-level public-key encryption needs migration. PCI DSS 4.0 + HIPAA push for PQ-ready KMS by 2027-2030.

label: SIM/eSIM provisioning
description: Cryptographic provisioning of cellular subscriber identities
compliance_notes: GSMA NG.116 + ETSI TS 103 744 specify PQ-ready provisioning. SIM/eSIM lifecycle 5-7 yr; carriers adopting hybrid in 2026 cohorts.

label: 5G network slicing security
description: PQC for network slice authentication and isolation in 5G
compliance_notes: GSMA + 3GPP Release 19/20 PQ-ready slice authentication. Carrier deadlines align with national PQC mandates (2028-2030).

label: SS7/Diameter protocol security
description: Signaling protocol integrity for telecom core networks
compliance_notes: Legacy protocol; security largely depends on diameter encapsulation. Not directly PQ-affected but signaling firewalls migrating to PQ TLS by 2030.

label: SWIFT messaging integrity
description: Cryptographic signing and verification of SWIFT interbank messages
compliance_notes: SWIFT CSP roadmap targets quantum-safe messaging integrity by 2028. DORA (EU) ICT risk requires PQ-readiness assessment by 2026.

label: Trading system code signing
description: Digital signatures for high-frequency trading software
compliance_notes: SOX + DORA require demonstrated PQ-readiness for code-signed trading binaries. Most major exchanges piloting in 2026.

label: Card payment encryption
description: POS terminal and card-not-present transaction encryption
compliance_notes: PCI DSS 4.0 PQC roadmap: assessment by 2027, full migration by 2030. EMV co. plans PQ-ready chip cards by 2028.

label: Medical device communication
description: Encrypted telemetry for connected medical devices
compliance_notes: FDA cybersecurity guidance + HIPAA. Long device lifecycle (10-20 yr); 2032 target reflects field-replacement cycles. New devices PQ-ready by 2028.

label: EHR/FHIR data exchange
description: Secure exchange of electronic health records via HL7/FHIR
compliance_notes: HIPAA + HITECH require strong key management. FHIR + EHR exchange transitions follow the broader TLS/auth migration to ML-KEM hybrid by 2030.

label: V2X communication
description: Vehicle-to-everything communication security (DSRC/C-V2X)
compliance_notes: IEEE 1609.2 PQ amendment in flight; ISO/SAE 21434 + UN ECE WP.29 R155/R156 push automotive OEMs to PQ-ready by 2030. 15+ yr vehicle lifecycle dominates planning.

label: OTA firmware updates
description: Signed over-the-air vehicle and device software updates
compliance_notes: Auto OTA must support PQ-signed firmware before 2030 for fleets in service through 2040+. ML-DSA / SLH-DSA signing pilots starting 2026.

label: ECU secure boot
description: Root-of-trust for automotive electronic control units
compliance_notes: Secure boot signing must transition before vehicles leave assembly. ISO/SAE 21434 + UN R155: PQ secure boot for 2028 model-year onward.

label: SCADA/OT system security
description: Cryptographic controls for industrial control systems
compliance_notes: NERC CIP + IEC 62443. Industrial control systems have 20-30 yr operating life and air-gapped designs that complicate patching. Field replacement cycle drives 2032 deadline.

label: Smart meter communication
description: Encrypted AMI/AMR infrastructure for utility metering
compliance_notes: Field-deployed meters (1B globally) often lack OTA capability. Replacement cycles drive 2032 target. New deployments PQ-ready by 2028.

label: Avionics communication
description: Encrypted and authenticated flight-critical avionics comms
compliance_notes: RTCA DO-326A + DoD CNSA 2.0. Aircraft 30-40 yr service life requires PQ retrofit path. Hybrid certificates standard by 2028, full PQC certificates by 2032.

label: Satellite link encryption
description: Long-lived key protection for satellite command and telemetry
compliance_notes: NATO STANAG 4774 + CNSA 2.0. Satellites can rarely be patched; ground-segment crypto migrates first, on-orbit replacements follow with new launch cohorts.

label: PKI / HSPD-12
description: Federal identity credentialing and PIV card cryptography
compliance_notes: CNSA 2.0 + FIPS 201 / HSPD-12. Federal smart cards transitioning to ML-DSA hybrid by 2028, required by 2030.

label: Classified data exchange
description: Cryptographic protection of classified communications
compliance_notes: CNSA 2.0 strict timeline: 2025 preferred, 2030 required, 2035 disallow non-PQC for U.S. classified communications. NATO STANAG 4774 aligns.

label: DNS/DNSSEC
description: DNS resolution integrity and DNSSEC zone signing
compliance_notes: DNSSEC ML-DSA in IETF draft; root and TLD operators piloting hybrid signing in 2026-2027. Full PQ DNSSEC by 2030.

label: Timestamping services
description: Long-lived cryptographic timestamps for legal and financial evidence
compliance_notes: eIDAS 2.0 qualified timestamps require PQ-ready signing by 2026 for new tokens. CNSA 2.0 timestamps follow code-signing timeline.

label: Backup/archive encryption
description: Encryption of backup tapes and cloud archives and disaster recovery stores
compliance_notes: Long retention drives high HNDL risk. Migrate KEK / KMS to ML-KEM hybrid by 2028; symmetric DEK (AES-256) remains quantum-safe.

label: API gateway / microservices
description: mTLS and JWT signing for service-to-service communication
compliance_notes: TLS + JWT/JWS auth chains. Hybrid TLS at the gateway by 2026, ML-DSA JWS by 2028 (IETF JOSE PQC drafts).

label: Secure boot (non-automotive)
description: Root-of-trust and firmware verification for servers and devices
compliance_notes: UEFI + Microsoft / Apple secure-boot keys must validate PQ signatures by 2030 to support PQ-signed firmware deployed earlier. TCG TPM PQC spec in draft.

label: Less than 1 year
description: Data that needs to stay confidential for under a year
compliance_notes: Retention <3 years — lower urgency; refresh on the next regulatory cycle (2032).

label: 1-5 years
description: Data with a short to medium confidentiality window
compliance_notes: Retention 3-7 years — align with CNSA 2.0 general timeline (2030).

label: 5-10 years
description: Data requiring a medium to long-term confidentiality window
compliance_notes: Retention 7-15 years — HNDL risk is real for sensitive workloads. Migrate KEK by 2028.

label: 10-25 years
description: Data requiring long-term confidentiality protection
compliance_notes: Retention ≥15 years — data encrypted today must remain confidential into the post-quantum era. Migrate KEK by 2027.

label: 25+ years
description: Data with very long or archival confidentiality requirements
compliance_notes: Retention ≥15 years — data encrypted today must remain confidential into the post-quantum era. Migrate KEK by 2027.

label: Indefinite
description: Data with no defined expiration of confidentiality
compliance_notes: Retention ≥15 years — data encrypted today must remain confidential into the post-quantum era. Migrate KEK by 2027.

label: 1-3 years (telematics)
description: Vehicle telemetry and OBD diagnostic records
compliance_notes: Retention 3-7 years — align with CNSA 2.0 general timeline (2030).

label: 10-15 years (vehicle lifetime)
description: ECU firmware, V2X certificates and vehicle safety-critical software
compliance_notes: Retention ≥15 years — data encrypted today must remain confidential into the post-quantum era. Migrate KEK by 2027.

label: 2 years (CDR / telecom)
description: Call detail records typical retention for mobile operators
compliance_notes: Retention <3 years — lower urgency; refresh on the next regulatory cycle (2032).

label: 6 years (HIPAA minimum)
description: Minimum retention under HIPAA for protected health information
compliance_notes: Retention 3-7 years — align with CNSA 2.0 general timeline (2030).

label: 7 years (financial records)
description: Standard regulatory records retention for financial institutions
compliance_notes: Retention 7-15 years — HNDL risk is real for sensitive workloads. Migrate KEK by 2028.

label: 75+ years (government archival)
description: Long-lived government and national security archival records
compliance_notes: Retention ≥15 years — data encrypted today must remain confidential into the post-quantum era. Migrate KEK by 2027.

label: 3 years (SOC 2 / audit logs)
description: Security audit logs and access records under SOC 2 Trust Service Criteria
compliance_notes: Retention 3-7 years — align with CNSA 2.0 general timeline (2030).

label: 3 years (NERC CIP-007)
description: Security event logs and cyber compliance records under NERC CIP-007-6 R5
compliance_notes: Retention 3-7 years — align with CNSA 2.0 general timeline (2030).

label: 7 years (FERC / billing)
description: Operational and billing records under FERC and IRS retention requirements
compliance_notes: Retention 7-15 years — HNDL risk is real for sensitive workloads. Migrate KEK by 2028.

label: Aircraft lifetime (20-40 years)
description: DO-178C software lifecycle data and FAA airworthiness records per 14 CFR §91.417, maintained for the service life of the aircraft
compliance_notes: Retention ≥15 years — data encrypted today must remain confidential into the post-quantum era. Migrate KEK by 2027.

label: 1 year (PCI DSS audit logs)
description: Payment transaction audit logs with 90 days immediately accessible per PCI DSS v4 Req. 10.7
compliance_notes: Retention <3 years — lower urgency; refresh on the next regulatory cycle (2032).

label: 2 years (PCI DSS cardholder data)
description: Maximum cardholder data storage period under PCI DSS requirements
compliance_notes: Retention <3 years — lower urgency; refresh on the next regulatory cycle (2032).

label: 6 years (FERPA / financial aid)
description: Student financial aid records under FERPA and 34 CFR §668.24
compliance_notes: Retention 3-7 years — align with CNSA 2.0 general timeline (2030).

label: Permanent (academic transcripts)
description: Academic transcripts and degrees maintained indefinitely per institutional policy and most state laws
compliance_notes: Retention ≥15 years — data encrypted today must remain confidential into the post-quantum era. Migrate KEK by 2027.

label: Permanent (state secrets)
description: Records with no defined expiration date
compliance_notes: Retention ≥15 years — data encrypted today must remain confidential into the post-quantum era. Migrate KEK by 2027.

label: Protected Health Information (PHI)
description: Patient records, diagnoses, prescriptions, lab results
compliance_notes: High HNDL relevance — adversaries likely already harvesting. Prioritise migration of all asymmetric primitives within 2-3 years.
